title: Less Than The Cloud To The Wind
content:
Less than the cloud to the wind,
Less than the foam to the sea,
Less than the rose to the storm
Am I to thee.

More than the star to the night,
More than the rain to the lea,
More than heaven to earth
Art thou to me.
meaning:
Sara Teasdale's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Less Than The Cloud To The Wind"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
